activeMonthsTooltip: Number of months your business (IČO) was active. Affects minimum health and social insurance payments and the flat-rate tax amount.
flatRateDisabledTooltip: Flat-rate expenses cannot be used with income above {{limit}} CZK

meta.title: Czech Tax Calculator for Self-Employed | Income & Flat-Rate Tax
meta.description: Free online calculator for Czech income tax, flat-rate tax and insurance contributions for self-employed (OSVČ) and entrepreneurs. Accurate calculation of net income, tax discounts, and mandatory insurance.
